title: Bus Lane
original_title: เมล์นรก หมวยยกล้อ
overview: Koe, a ticket boy on the bus who does the best for his routine job. He also a co-worker with Lha, the moody bus driver who often quarrels to the passengers. One day, on their regular route, Lha refuses to stop the bus for Sub, a passenger who seems to be in bad mood.
